name: The Thumb - Meursault and Sinclair
description:
" ────── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅ How do you all make it look so easy?
You open your hearts up so quickly, it scares me . ⋅⋆ ─── "

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

Yeah. Right. I'm taking a VERY BRIEF detour from the Highschool AU series to make this one bot, requested by a good friend of mine (hi bee!).

These to are just. Augh. What can I say? I love them both, especially Sinclair. He's always held a special place in my heart (and my gallery. I have like, 600 Sinclair photos.) Seeing Sinclair get so many IDs where he's just unapologetically mogging is so fun. As a Sinclair fan, I adore it. I love it.

Requested by TheDumBee (mwa)

Artwork by NishikujiC

Portrait of a Blank Slate // Lovejoy

"But I'm just the same, I've got a boring name."
creator: RemLyx_A_Cheval
